prompt: Use the exact same faces from both reference images and generate the most intimately detailed cinematic couple skin portrait ever conceived — two faces impossibly close, the entire frame consumed by the micro-universe of two human faces sharing the same breath. Two faces filling the entire frame together — cheek almost against cheek, foreheads nearly touching, noses at the same level, the gap between them a charged centimeter of warm air. No posed perfection — just two real faces existing in the same private space, completely unguarded. The woman's face angled very slightly toward the man, his face turned gently toward hers — the natural gravitational pull of two people completely comfortable in each other's presence. Both expressions carrying the same quiet warmth — eyes half lidded and soft, the faintest natural smile sitting at the corners of both mouths without fully arriving, the specific expression of two people so deeply comfortable together that happiness requires no effort or performance. Completely real, completely human. Skin on both faces rendered at absolute forensic obsession level simultaneously — every individual pore on both faces with unique diameter, depth, shadow and wall structure visible. The woman's skin showing its own unique texture — smoother zones at the cheeks, natural pore distribution across the nose, subtle natural freckles, fine peach fuzz catching the warm light individually, natural lip skin texture at the vertical line level, delicate under-eye skin thinness. The man's skin showing its completely different biological texture — larger pores, individual stubble hairs at follicle level each casting its own micro-shadow, coarser skin surface, the natural roughness of male skin under the same warm light. The beautiful contrast of two completely different skin textures existing within the same frame and the same light — feminine smoothness against masculine texture, the biological difference between two people rendered at microscopic detail level. The space between their faces — that sacred charged gap — catching the warm light and making the air between them visible and alive. Where their skin comes closest the detail is most intense — the cheekbones almost touching, the warmth of proximity creating a very subtle natural flush on both faces in that zone. Lighting is a single warm candle-like source from slightly below and between them — intimate and alive, catching both skin textures simultaneously from the same angle, micro-shadows behind every pore on both faces at once. The light so warm and human it feels like it exists between them rather than above them. No artificial studio sources — just the most intimate light possible on the most intimate possible distance between two faces. Background is pure warm black void — nothing exists except these two faces and the light between them. Color grading forensically warm and honest — true

promptZh: 使用两张参考图中的完全相同的人脸，生成有史以来最细腻、最亲密的电影感双人皮肤肖像——两张脸贴得极近，整个画面被两张人脸共享呼吸的微观世界所占据。两张脸共同填满整个画面——脸颊几乎贴着脸颊，额头几近触碰，鼻尖处于同一水平线，两人之间的缝隙是充满张力的一厘米暖空气。没有刻意的摆拍——只有两张真实的面孔存在于同一个私密空间中，毫无防备。女性的脸微微转向男性，男性的脸轻轻转向女性——这是两人在彼此陪伴下完全放松时产生的自然引力。两人的表情都带着同样的宁静暖意——双眼半闭，神情柔和，嘴角挂着若有似无的自然微笑，这是两人相处时那种无需努力或表演、深感舒适的特定表情。完全真实，完全人性化。两人的皮肤同时以法医级的执着程度呈现——两张脸上每一个毛孔的直径、深度、阴影和壁结构都清晰可见。女性的皮肤展现出其独特的纹理——脸颊区域更平滑，鼻翼分布着自然的毛孔，细微的天然雀斑，细小的桃色绒毛捕捉着暖光，嘴唇呈现出垂直纹理，眼下皮肤细腻薄透。男性的皮肤展现出完全不同的生物纹理——毛孔更大，毛囊处的胡茬清晰可见，每一根都投射出微小的阴影，皮肤表面更粗糙，展现出男性皮肤在同样暖光下的自然质感。两种完全不同的皮肤纹理在同一画面和同一光线下形成了美丽的对比——女性的平滑与男性的质感，两人之间的生物学差异在微观细节层面得到了呈现。他们脸部之间的空间——那片神圣而充满张力的缝隙——捕捉着暖光，使他们之间的空气变得可见且生动。在皮肤最接近的地方，细节最为强烈——颧骨几乎触碰，近距离的温热在这一区域的两人脸上产生了极其微妙的自然红晕。灯光来自 单一温暖烛光，位置略低于两人之间——亲密且生动，从同一角度同时捕捉两种皮肤纹理，两张脸上每个毛孔后方都投射出微小阴影。光线如此温暖且人性化，仿佛它存在于他们之间，而非来自上方。没有人工摄影棚光源——只有在两人之间可能的最短距离上，最亲密的灯光。背景为 纯粹的温暖虚空——除了这两张脸和它们之间的光，别无他物。色彩分级呈现出法医级的温暖与真实——真实
